headline: PG&E Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: PCG beats Q2 earnings estimates as expanding data center demand and lower operating expenses help offset a revenue miss.

headline: Keybanc Downgrades CMS Energy to Sector Weight
summary: Keybanc  analyst Sophie Karp   downgrades CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) from Overweight to Sector Weight.
